title: Runner home: wasc-local driver vs new monorepo sibling package
context: Runner home: wasc-local driver in prompt-workshop/dispatch/ (file:// deep imports) vs a new monorepo sibling package pi-workflows-cli. Both constraint-compliant (no pi-workflows change); pick before runner impl.
decision: Wasc-local driver in prompt-workshop/dispatch/ using absolute file:// deep imports of the pi-workflows dist/ engine functions. Sibling package rejected: it adds a package in another repo for no functional gain (only createAgentLoader gains a bare import) and is ecosystem scope the task does not need; the workshop tooling and substrate live in the wasc repo and absolute file:// is the established ESM-loader pattern here.
consequences: Determines where FEAT-001 runner code lives and how the engine is imported.
